What my colleagues say about me.

Verified LinkedIn recommendations from managers and peers across Apex Group and Ethinos Digital Marketing.

"

She brings a rare combination of strategic clarity and disciplined execution. Whether working on automation tools, improving campaign performance, or aligning cross-functional teams, Sakshi consistently moved work forward with structure and intent. Her ability to translate business goals into scalable automation programs made her a dependable partner on high-visibility initiatives. Whoever works with her next will be lucky to have her.

Ambreen Q.
VP, Global Demand & Campaign Marketing
Apex Group Ltd
"

What I really appreciated about Sakshi was how easy she was to work with. She kept communication clear, stayed organised, and made sure everyone was aligned. One of the highlights was delivering campaigns under tight timelines while ensuring automations were set up accurately in Pardot. She'll be a great addition to any team!

Manoj Ambardekar
VP, Lead Data & Marketing Analytics
Apex Group Ltd
"

Her knack for 'attention to detail' ensured 100% accuracy in our CRM campaigns. Sakshi is always curious to know the 'why' behind any action — showing her hunger to learn. She can work her way out even in ambiguous situations and difficult timelines, always eager to go that extra mile to deliver exceptional results.

Suraj Jadhav
Head of Customer Retention
Americana Restaurants
"

Sakshi was selected for Americana Foods based on her stakeholder management, technical skills, and commitment to getting things done — and she did an incredible job. We received positive client feedback for her dedication within the first quarter. She trained juniors, grew the team, and helped manage Apollo 247, Wellness Forever & Americana Foods.

Sakshi has always endeavoured to excel in any task assigned to her. When offered a change of role from Social Media Executive to Marketing Automation Executive, she fully justified her new role.
